login.title: Connect to your HA Exporter
login.description: Paste the bearer token you configured in the Home Assistant integration. It is stored only in this browser.
login.invalid: That token was rejected by the server.
login.offline: The server did not respond. Is the endpoint reachable?

range.label: Range
range.prevAria: Go to the previous day or shift the range one day back
range.nextAria: Go to the next day or shift the range one day forward

summary.noData: No data yet. The exporter will push hourly statistics as they arrive.
summary.partialStatisticHistory: The first stored sample for at least one solar / battery / gas series begins about {{hours}} h after the start of this range. Totals here only sum buckets that exist on this server — Home Assistant still has the full recorder timeline locally, so values can look lower until history has been exported (e.g. run ha_exporter.backfill, or wait after reset_remote).
summary.partialHistoryAria: Why totals may look lower for this range
summary.insightCo2Footnote: Solar-to-home and full battery discharge kWh (same idea as the energy flow), × a typical grid intensity; if Electricity Maps / CO₂ signal is set, the fossil share scales the estimate.
summary.insightTreesFootnote: Rough mature-tree years to absorb the same CO₂ (~22 kg CO₂ per tree per year).
summary.heroConsumptionFootnote: Solar, battery, and grid shares of current load
summary.heroCurrentViewUnavailable: Live split needs the Energy dashboard power sensors (same as the Live page).
summary.lastSyncedNever: No ingest from Home Assistant has been recorded for this instance yet.
summary.syncToggleAria: Last sync time and debug details
summary.syncDebugIntro: The time on the button is the latest moment this server accepted data from Home Assistant. Raw timestamps below help compare with HA / exporter logs.

electricity.title: Electricity usage
electricity.sankeyEmpty: Not enough data for this range. Hourly statistics from your Home Assistant Energy dashboard are required.
electricity.devicesEmpty: No per-device energy statistics for this range.
electricity.deviceHierarchyHint: Some meters are grouped under a parent in the Energy dashboard (included in the parent's total). Only top-level meters are counted here so sums match net import, without double counting like in Home Assistant's flow view.
electricity.deviceHierarchyHintAria: How grouped devices are counted in this chart

now.title: Live
now.subtitle: Power over time and where it flowed today
now.noLatest: No live readings yet. Waiting for the next push.
now.noPowerSensors: No power sensors (stat_rate) are configured in your Home Assistant Energy dashboard. Add them there and they'll show up here.
now.hydrating: Still hydrating today's data from Home Assistant. The 5-minute statistics arrive on the next collector tick (≤ 5 min); the full chart will appear shortly.
now.timelineBrushHint: Drag the range bar under the graph to zoom the time range.

sankey.title: Current power flow
sankey.empty: Not enough data yet — once today's statistics start arriving, this will show where the energy went.
